message: Istanbul's transformation continues with us; the opposition would return Istanbul to its dark days.

party_or_movement: CHP (2019-01 to 2023-11); CHP backbench elder thereafter
message: Anti-corruption + service delivery alternative; opposition unity proves itself in city races.
'Everything will be very nice' — competent and inclusive mayoral candidacy bridging cultural divisions.
Vote AKP-MHP alliance to defeat terror-supporting opposition.
'Winter is coming' for the AKP — alliance via non-candidacy in metros to stop one-man rule.
expected_positive_effect: mobilize IYI base + allow CHP win

message: No HDP candidate in 7 metros — the vote that hurts AKP-MHP is the vote that defends democracy.
expected_positive_effect: secures CHP wins; mobilizes Kurdish western diaspora
vote_shift_direction: toward Nation Alliance metros; toward HDP southeast

message: From prison: the vote that ends authoritarianism is the vote for peace.
Non-candidacy in 7 metros is a political act — choosing where the vote ends authoritarianism.
Mardin co-mayor candidacy — the six-decade movement returns to local governance.
Procedural integrity is required; whoever wins Istanbul wins Turkey — patriotic vigilance demands a rerun.
expected_backlash: mass backlash from secular + Kurdish + youth

party_or_movement: CHP (2019-01 to 2023-11); CHP backbench elder thereafter
message: The democratic mandate must be respected; this rerun is a referendum on the rule of law itself.
Radical Love — inclusion of all Istanbul, refusal of polarisation, focus on service.
Endorse the AKP candidate; defend national unity against opposition collusion with the PKK.
expected_backlash: nationalist defections to Imamoglu (KONDA ~50% MHP switched)

message: 'Winter is coming' — all democrats must defend the ballot.
Defend the vote — the rerun is a test of whether elections still mean anything.
expected_positive_effect: locks Istanbul Kurdish vote behind Imamoglu

message: The choice is between continued one-man rule and a democratic restart.
Strategic non-candidacy was the right call; defend the result.
Trustees protect citizens from terror-linked municipalities — security overrides the ballot.

party_or_movement: CHP (2019-01 to 2023-11); CHP backbench elder thereafter
message: Removing elected mayors is not security policy — it is democratic regression.
The ballot must mean what it says; Istanbul stands with cities whose mandates are cancelled.
Trustees are correct because the elected officials served terror networks.
The principle of the ballot must be defended even where one disagrees with the result.
A mass coordinated state operation, not three independent decisions; 418 detained across 29 provinces — defend the ballot.
Voters chose me as Mardin's mayor; the President had other plans — is the ballot still the ballot? (Washington Post op-ed framing)
Trustees do not erase mandates — the movement continues under any banner.
Drawing on Siirt experience: kayyum is economic-political punishment, not security policy.
It is not possible to be ready for a disaster like this; God-given; we rebuild quickly; critics are dishonourable.
expected_positive_effect: retains 8 of 11 quake provinces in May 2023
vote_shift_direction: partial defence in quake region; net negative urban

party_or_movement: CHP (2019-01 to 2023-11); CHP backbench elder thereafter
message: Government accountability; structural critique; CHP municipalities respond effectively.
IBB rescue teams deployed quickly; transparency on aid; visible field presence.
National unity around the state; security-discipline framing.
Accountability; condemnation of building-amnesty laws.

Hatay Arab-Alevi victims need rights-based response; AFAD/government accountability.

message: Helallesme; rule of law; 'Bay Kemal' relatable figure; coalition of six plus HDP/YSP.

Nationalist defence of the state; MHP holds at 10.1%.
Backs Kilicdaroglu within Table of Six; nationalist legitimisation.
